title: Marketplace Manager - Ecom Express Holdings Services - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Ecom Express Holdings Services - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Join the Ecom Express Holdings Services family as a Marketplace Manager in Agra. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Ecom Express Holdings Services:
Ecom Express Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ecom Express Holdings Services!
